Timeline: - Immediate start preferred - Final delivery needed within 2–3 business days To Be Considered, Please Include ALL of the Following in Your Response: - Estimated turnaround time - Fixed price for the full project - Your available hours in PST (California time) - Examples of previous tri-fold brochure work Important: - Applications missing any of the requested information above will not be considered. title: High-End Luxury Logo Vectorization
desc: Project Overview: We need a professional graphic designer to manually vector-trace an intricate, geometric luxury home builder logo from a reference image. The final logo must be flawless, with razor-sharp lines and precise symmetry. It must match a high-end, luxury aesthetic—flat 2D color block design with refined, thin typography. No 3D effects, gradients, or heavy fonts. Source Material Provided: Attached image (⁠image.png⁠): Shows the concept. The logo mark is visible on the vertical wood panel on the left and the stone sign on the right. Company Name: Mozzafiato Homes Tagline: EXQUISITE LIVING. REFINED DESIGN. Design Requirements: Logo Mark: Replicate the thin-line geometric pitched roof encompassing an interlocking, symmetrical letter "M" with a diamond-like peak at the center intersection. Ensure perfect geometric symmetry and uniform line weights. Typography: Use a high-end, elegant, and thinner serif font for "MOZZAFIATO HOMES". Tracking (letter-spacing) should be clean and spaced intentionally for a premium look. title: Instagram Content for Product Promotion -- 2
desc: I need a creative partner to craft a steady stream of Instagram-ready posts that spotlight my products and services. The topics are wide-ranging—think lifestyle angles, behind-the-scenes looks, quick tips, user testimonials, seasonal tie-ins—anything that keeps the feed fresh while driving interest back to what I sell. Here’s what I’m after: • 12 fully written captions per month (engaging hook, concise body, clear call-to-action) • Visual direction for each post (concept reference, suggested imagery style, on-brand color hints) • A short list of relevant hashtags and any tag suggestions to widen reach Every piece must feel native to Instagram, align with brand voice guidelines I’ll supply, and be delivered in a neat content calendar so scheduling is effortless on my end. If you have design skills in Canva, Adobe Express, or similar tools, let me know—I’m open to having the visuals produced too, but caption-first is the priority. Quality counts more than sheer volume: posts should read naturally, avoid fluff, and make the product benefit obvious without sounding like an ad. I’ll review the first batch, give quick feedback, and once we’re in sync, this can turn into ongoing monthly work.

title: Instagram Post Design
desc: I'm looking for a designer to create engaging Instagram posts. Ideal skills and experience: - Proficiency in graphic design - Experience with Instagram content creation - Ability to work with given themes and concepts Please share your portfolio and relevant experience.

The ideal candidate should have experience in preparing print-ready files, ensuring proper dimensions, bleed, and color profiles. Attention to detail and familiarity with printing standards are required. If you have a keen eye for layout and print specifications, I would love to work with you!

title: Label design

title: Label design needed

desc: I need someone to create letterhead and envelopes for my company. I have a logo designed by ChatGPT to start with. The designer should be able to incorporate the logo into professional-looking letterhead and envelopes. Attention to detail and creativity in design are essential.

title: LinkedIn Banner Designer Needed
desc: We are seeking a creative designer to craft engaging LinkedIn banners that align with our brand identity. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and social media marketing, ensuring the banners are visually appealing and effective in capturing audience attention. If you have a portfolio showcasing your work in this area, we would love to hear from you!

title: LinkedIn Milestone Graphic Design
desc: I need a crisp, visually engaging graphic to announce a recent company milestone on LinkedIn. The goal is to celebrate the achievement while doubling as an official company news update, so the layout must feel professional and formal rather than casual. Please craft a concept that aligns with typical LinkedIn dimensions and our existing brand palette. I will supply the logo, colour codes, and headline copy once we agree on a direction. Use subtle, confident typography, clean lines, and a balanced composition that immediately reads as a milestone celebration without veering into loud or playful territory. Deliverables: • One static LinkedIn-ready image (1200 × 1200 px or 1200 × 627 px) • Editable source file (AI, PSD, or Figma) • Web-optimised PNG/JPG for upload Acceptance criteria: the graphic must present the milestone text clearly at first glance, incorporate the company logo without distortion, meet LinkedIn size limits, and preserve full legibility when viewed on mobile. Tools such as Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, or Figma are fine—choose whichever lets you maintain sharp vector elements and precise colour control.

title: Logo Recreation in Vector Format
desc: Need logo recreated as a fully editable vector file (AI/SVG/EPS). I already have a logo image with my brand name and mascot. I need it professionally recreated to ensure high-quality scalability and editability. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and vector graphics, ensuring the final product is both visually appealing and functional.

Scope of Work - Refine the existing Canva logo to eliminate fade issues - Ensure the logo functions correctly on various backgrounds - Provide logo files in multiple formats for print and digital use
